microsoft_ft: Owned Azure resilience validation **end-to-end** — scoping requirements, defining success metrics, and managing the roadmap to drive enterprise customers from signed contract to full production adoption across 45+ annual drills and **$14M+ business impact**.

Led **0→1** development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, translating customer friction into product requirements and self-service scheduling that cut operational toil **30%** and scaled execution as the program grew.

Served as strategic partner to senior leaders at enterprise accounts (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), leading steering forums and high-stakes conversations on operational redesign, systems integration, and recovery readiness.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge lead on a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, surfacing risk early and driving retention plays.

Scaled team leverage by building an internal **AI agent** and restructuring planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time **39%** and growing drill capacity 21% — defining playbooks and operating standards as the function scaled.
microsoft_2023: Drove adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across 14 teams via user demos and training, monitoring usage to surface friction and saving **37 engineering hours monthly**.
Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by leading **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to translate customer needs into prioritized feature gaps.
Optimized data integrity and retrieval by setting metadata standards and migrating docs to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time **83%**.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions **28% faster** by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework across complex, multi-stakeholder deployments.
Mobilized a product strategy to cut launch toil — running discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours** of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical paths.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning and retrospectives — prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process.
Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle **25%**.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** via a new CRM process.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy across the website and Google profile.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify and seal margin leaks.
